name: Fruitcake Cookies
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Cherries, green, candied and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the candied pineapple, cherries, raisins, pecans or walnuts, and brandy.
2. Add 3 cups of flour to the fruit mixture and stir well until combined.
3. In another bowl, cream the butter until smooth.
4. Gradually add sugar to the butter, beating well at medium speed.
5. Add egg yolks, mixing well.
6. Dissolve baking soda in milk and add to the creamed mixture.
7. Stir in the remaining brandy, cinnamon, nutmeg, and 2 1/2 cups flour until well combined.
8. Beat egg whites until stiff and fold into the batter.
9. Gently fold in the fruit mixture.
10. Drop dough by rounded teaspoonfuls onto greased cookie sheets.
11. Bake at 325°F for 12 to 15 minutes, or until set.
12. Cool on wire racks.
Yield: about 10 dozen
